summary: Complete end-to-end testing of maintenance log application completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Config CRUD operations - machines, technicians, spare parts
Maintenance logs CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete
Error handling - 404 for non-existent logs, 400 for duplicates
Dropdown management modal - add/delete config items
Stats cards showing correct counts and most active machine
Excel export functionality with proper filename generation
Edit log functionality with form population
Real-time UI updates after CRUD operations
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
